summary: Iteration 28: Testing Pinnwand System, Dashboard Tabs, and Group Mentions. All 9 features tested successfully - 16 backend API tests passed, 9 frontend UI tests passed.

issues: TipTap warning: Duplicate extension names found: ['link', 'underline'] - non-blocking but should be cleaned up

critical_code_review_comments: TipTap editor has duplicate extension warnings for 'link' and 'underline' - consider deduplicating extensions in RichTextEditor.jsx
seed_data_creation: Test categories and groups created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pinnwand and Group Mention features verified working: (1) Dashboard has two tabs - Pinnwand and Dashboard. (2) Dashboard tab shows sections in correct order: Favoriten → Zuletzt angesehen → Neueste Artikel → Statistiken. (3) Schnellzugriff section is removed. (4) Pinnwand tab shows empty state message when no Pinnwand articles exist. (5) Categories dialog has Pinnwand-Kategorie checkbox with data-testid='pinnwand-checkbox'. (6) Pinnwand badge shows in category tree view for categories with is_pinnwand=true. (7) GET /api/categories/pinnwand/articles returns articles from Pinnwand categories only. (8) GET /api/groups/search/mention returns groups with member_count field. (9) Group mention extension works with @@@ trigger showing Gruppen-Erwähnung dropdown with group names, badges, and member counts.

dashboard_tabs.details: Both Pinnwand and Dashboard tabs exist with correct data-testid attributes

dashboard_order.details: Dashboard tab shows: Favoriten → Zuletzt angesehen → Neueste Artikel → Statistiken

schnellzugriff_removed.details: Schnellzugriff section is not present in Dashboard

pinnwand_empty_state.details: Pinnwand tab shows 'Keine Pinnwand-Artikel' message with explanation

pinnwand_checkbox.details: Pinnwand-Kategorie checkbox exists in category dialog with data-testid='pinnwand-checkbox'

pinnwand_badge.details: Pinnwand badge shows in tree view for categories with is_pinnwand=true

pinnwand_articles_api.details: GET /api/categories/pinnwand/articles returns articles from Pinnwand categories

groups_mention_api.details: GET /api/groups/search/mention returns groups with member_count field

group_mention_extension.details: @@@ trigger shows Gruppen-Erwähnung dropdown with group names, badges, and member counts
